_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Realm-Sealing Grand Array. Canon event: Wang Lin encounters the Realm-Sealing Grand Array that seals the Cave World. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Realm-Sealing Grand Array
canon_event: Wang Lin encounters the Realm-Sealing Grand Array that seals the Cave World
why_untaken: Requires Ascendant+ cultivation to even perceive the array.
natural_next_event: The array was placed by the Seven-Colored Daoist; it persists.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
